turns.content: bro do you ever think about how people complain about the smallest things
All the time, honestly. What brought that on?
had a passenger today going off about his coffee order being wrong. like full meltdown. and im just sitting there driving like bro you have no idea
Yeah, perspective is wild like that. Sounds like you've seen enough to know what real problems look like.
wallahi bro i came from darfur. like actual darfur. refugee camp and everything. got resettled here when i was 19. didnt speak a word of english
That's an incredibly tough journey. Coming to a new country at 19 with no English — how did you even start to figure things out?
you just do it bro theres no other option. houston had a sudanese community so that helped but everything else i built from zero. zero
Starting from absolutely nothing and building a life — that takes a different kind of strength. The Sudanese community here must have been a lifeline early on.
yeah they were. but also you learn fast when you have to. like english i just learned from talking to people working jobs listening. no classes at first just survival
Survival is the best teacher, honestly. You picked it up just by being in it every day. That takes guts and a lot of patience with yourself.
thats why i dont complain about driving 12 hours. like bro ive been through way worse. this is easy compared to what i already survived
That perspective is something most people never develop. When you've already been through the hardest thing, long hours behind the wheel probably feel like a choice — not a burden.
exactly bro. its a blessing wallahi. i choose to drive. i choose to work. nobody is forcing me. thats the difference
Freedom to choose your own grind — that's everything. A lot of people don't realize how much that matters until they hear a story like yours.
yeah man. anyway happy thanksgiving weekend or whatever lol. at least the tips should be better tonight
Ha, holiday tippers are usually more generous. Hope you clean up tonight, you deserve it. Happy Thanksgiving to you too, man.
